productDisplayName: Van Heusen Men Black & Brown Reversible Belt
description: Style NoteYou know you can trust van heusen when it comes to sharp formal essentials that help make the right board room impression. When the brand comes up with belts, now that's the cherry on top of a fantastic formal ensemble. Classy, elegant yet minimalistic (the mood of the moment) style this belt with a tonal pair of shoes!Product DetailsReversible textured belt, brown on one side and black on the otherHas an adjustable buckle which you can pull and twist to change belt colourMaterial and CareLeatherWipe with a clean cloth to remove dust
